---
name: Bug
about: A defect or unexpected behavior in a component
---

**Type:** bug

**Priority:** critical | high | medium | low

**Status:** pending | approved | in-progress | needs-more-info | implemented | wont-fix

**Created by:** <name>

**Claimed by:** none

**Skill:** <skill name> v<skill version>

**Component:** harness | a2-claude | a2-codex | a2-gemini | ui | operator | charts | _(leave blank if cross-cutting or other)_

**Confidence:** high | medium | low — <one sentence justification>

**Expected:** <what should happen>

**Actual:** <what happens instead>

**File:** <file path and line number>

**Reproduction:** <steps to reproduce, or `not yet reproduced`>

**Fix:** <suggested fix, or `unknown`>

**Depends on:**
- none

**Acceptance criteria:**

- [ ] Bug no longer reproduces
- [ ] Relevant tests updated or added
